name: Ossi Di Morti -"Bones of the Dead" Cookies # 2
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Quick mix flour (such as Wondra)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the dry ingredients together.
2. Combine the oils with warm water in a 2/3 cup measure.
3. Slowly add the warm water to the dry ingredients until a heavy dough forms that is not sticky.
4. Do not add more flour.
5. Tear off a piece about the size of an orange and roll it into a rope on an unfloured surface.
6. Roll the dough into a piece about 1 1/4 inch wide, then press flat to a height of about 1/4 inch.
7. Using a small knife, make diagonal cuts in one direction, then repeat in the other direction to create a lattice effect on the flattened rope.
8. Bake at 325°F for 50 minutes to 1 hour.
9. Dust with additional powdered sugar.
10. Dunk the cookies in liquid before eating.
Serving Ideas: Freshly made coffee or tea
Notes: Do not eat these cookies unless they have been softened or dunked in liquid. They could break your teeth.
